name: Grind Rush
short_description: Join an intense off-road race where 16 vehicles collide! Compete with buggies and monster trucks through forests and canyons. Destroy courses and rival cars to reach the top!
detailed_description:
Join an intense off-road race where 16 vehicles collide! Race across six different tracks, including forests, beaches, and canyons, using four types of vehicles such as buggies and monster trucks. Destroy obstacles to find shortcuts, and eliminate rival cars to gain an advantage in the race.

Vehicle Types

  • Buggy
  • Sedan
  • ATV
  • Monster Truck
The size and weight of your vehicle greatly impact the race. Light and small ATVs are agile and can navigate narrow paths but are vulnerable to obstacles and collisions with rivals. On the other hand, heavy and large monster trucks struggle with tight turns and narrow paths but can crush obstacles and rival cars while advancing. Other differences include acceleration, top speed, and terrain adaptability.

The Thrill of Off-Road Racing

All tracks are unpaved and filled with numerous jumps and steep slopes. Use your boost wisely to overcome these challenges. You may even find risky shortcuts off the main route. To win the race, you'll need not only advanced driving skills but also a deep understanding of the terrain.

Satisfying Destruction Effects

Most objects on the track can be destroyed upon collision, with parts flying apart and walls shattering. Destroying objects might even reveal hidden shortcuts.

Features

  • 16-vehicle off-road racing
  • Four vehicle types competing together
  • Vehicle part damage
  • Vehicle destruction
  • Obstacle destruction
  • Unlimited boost and explosions
  • Three difficulty levels
  • This game is inspired by MotorStorm, Burnout, and Split/Second.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean
